task: Read the on-board temperature sensor and print the temperature in degrees Celsius to the serial monitor once every second.
Print both temperature (in Celsius) and humidity (in percent relative humidity) once per second, each value clearly labelled, to the serial monitor.
Every second, read the temperature. If it is above 30 degrees Celsius, print a line that starts with the word WARNING; otherwise print the temperature value.
Take 10 temperature readings, compute their average, and print the mean temperature once every 10 seconds.
Print the humidity reading only when it has changed by more than 2 percent relative humidity since the previous reading; otherwise print nothing.
